entities.name: Alzheimer disease
entities.description: Main form of dementia, major public health problem with strong genetic component
entities.evidence: Alzheimer's disease (AD) represents the main form of dementia, and is a major public health problem.

entities.name: APP
entities.description: Amyloid precursor protein gene; mutations cause early-onset autosomal dominant AD; also implicated in LOAD
entities.evidence: discovery of mutations in three major genes, APP, PSEN1, and PSEN2

entities.name: PSEN1
entities.description: Presenilin 1 gene; mutations cause early-onset autosomal dominant AD
entities.evidence: discovery of mutations in three major genes, APP, PSEN1, and PSEN2

entities.name: PSEN2
entities.description: Presenilin 2 gene; mutations cause early-onset autosomal dominant AD
entities.evidence: discovery of mutations in three major genes, APP, PSEN1, and PSEN2

entities.name: APOE
entities.description: Apolipoprotein E gene; major genetic risk factor for late-onset sporadic AD
entities.evidence: variants in Apolipoprotein E (APOE) as the major genetic risk factor for late-onset sporadic forms of AD

entities.name: apolipoprotein E
entities.description: Protein encoded by APOE; major genetic risk factor for LOAD
entities.evidence: Apolipoprotein E (APOE) as the major genetic risk factor

entities.name: SORL1
entities.description: Sortilin-related receptor 1; AD risk gene identified through candidate gene approaches and GWAS
entities.evidence: with the exception of variants in SORL1

entities.name: BIN1
entities.description: Bridging integrator 1; GWAS-identified AD risk locus
entities.evidence: novel AD genes including BIN1, CR1, CLU

entities.evidence: novel AD genes including BIN1, CR1, CLU
